final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: step-by-step technical tutorial infographic, horizontal or vertical layout
Primary request: illustrated guide showing how to deploy Hermes inside a Docker container and integrate GLMCodingPlan, with clearly labeled steps 1-2-3-4
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light gray background with subtle grid or tech-pattern texture
Subject: four sequential steps depicting: 1) pulling/building a Docker image for Hermes, 2) running the Docker container with configuration flags, 3) connecting/integrating GLMCodingPlan API or service, 4) verifying the deployment and testing the connection; each step shown with a diagram panel, terminal command snippet, and small icon
Style/medium: flat vector illustration with code block elements, technical diagram style
Composition/framing: top-down vertical flow or left-to-right horizontal flow, each step in a clearly bordered card/panel
Lighting/mood: clean, modern, instructional — no shadows, flat and readable
Color palette: deep navy blue for step headers, teal/cyan accent for Docker elements, green for GLMCodingPlan elements, white card backgrounds, dark gray monospace text for code snippets
Materials/textures: flat vector, no gradients except subtle card shadows for depth
Text (verbatim): step labels "1", "2", "3", "4" prominently displayed; section titles such as "Pull Docker Image", "Run Hermes Container", "接入 GLMCodingPlan", "Verify & Test"
Constraints: all four steps must be visible and clearly numbered 1 through 4; code snippets must appear in monospace font blocks; Docker whale logo style icon and GLMCodingPlan label must be present
Avoid: blurry text, overlapping panels, decorative clutter unrelated to the technical content, photorealistic rendering
